name: South Africa
avoid: Winter in Cape Town (Jun-Aug) is wet

cities.name: Cape Town
cities.notes: Table Mountain cable car, Cape Point, Boulders penguin beach and Winelands

cities.name: Johannesburg
cities.notes: Apartheid Museum, Soweto tour, Mandela House and Maboneng arts precinct

cities.name: Durban
cities.notes: Golden Mile beach, Umhlanga Rocks and spicy bunny chow street food

cities.name: Stellenbosch
cities.notes: Cape Dutch architecture, wine estate tours and Jonkershoek hiking

cities.name: Kruger National Park
cities.notes: Africa's premier Big Five game reserve with self-drive or guided safaris

cities.name: Garden Route
cities.notes: Scenic coastal road with Tsitsikamma forest, bungee bridge and whale watching
